description:
GIVEN TTS is enabled
AND the user is in the video player

steps.action:
WHEN the user focuses on the "Milestone" tab
AND the user navigates down from the Milestone tab and focus on the right arrow key (For example: the user is in the second inning)
AND the user navigates to the right or left to view another Inning
AND the user navigates on the last Inning
steps.result:
THEN the user should hear "In the Inning navigation, press down to view milestones in first inning, press right arrow key to view milestones in the next inning"
AND the user should hear "Viewing first inning, press left arrow key to view milestones in the previous inning, press right arrow key to view milestones in the next inning"
AND the user should hear "Viewing first inning, press left arrow ket to view milestones in the previous inning"
